MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOPP, GUNTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-03-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-10-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PL. PRESENT W/GUAD- ALUPE GAMINO AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 2153 MISSION ST, #17 - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMED- IATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 8-31-93 - $500 RENT & DAMAGES BRENDON CALDWELL SHALL HAVE REASONABLE VISITATION RIGHTS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDWELL, WENDY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2135 MISSION ST, #17, S.F. $500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, LEASE FORFEITED
